issue_summary: In solvers, the maximum number of evaluations is passed as a parameter to the method "solve". The "setMaxEvaluations" accessor is removed.
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Find the upper bound b ensuring bracketing of a root between a and b.
     *
     * @param f function whose root must be bracketed.
     * @param a lower bound of the interval.
     * @param h initial step to try.
     * @return b such that f(a) and f(b) have opposite signs.
     * @exception MathIllegalStateException if no bracket can be found.
     * @exception MathUserException if function throws one.
     */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Find the upper bound b ensuring bracketing of a root between a and b.
     *
     * @param f function whose root must be bracketed.
     * @param a lower bound of the interval.
     * @param h initial step to try.
     * @return b such that f(a) and f(b) have opposite signs.
     * @throws MathIllegalStateException if no bracket can be found.
     * @throws org.apache.commons.math.exception.MathUserException if the
     * function throws one.
     */
